---
name: Feature Request / Story
about: Propose a new feature or user story for the application
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: 'feature, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## 📖 User Story

**As a** [type of user]
**I want to** [goal/action]
**So that** [benefit/reason]

---

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria

**This story is complete when:**

- [ ] Criterion 1: <!-- Specific, measurable, testable condition -->
- [ ] Criterion 2: <!-- Specific, measurable, testable condition -->
- [ ] Criterion 3: <!-- Specific, measurable, testable condition -->

**Add more criteria as needed by duplicating the bullet point**

---

## 📋 Implementation Requirements

**Backend (if applicable):**
- [ ] API endpoint(s): <!-- e.g., POST /api/portfolios -->
- [ ] Database changes: <!-- e.g., new table, new columns -->
- [ ] Business logic: <!-- high-level description -->

**Frontend (if applicable):**
- [ ] UI components: <!-- e.g., new page, form, modal -->
- [ ] User flows: <!-- e.g., navigation paths -->
- [ ] State management: <!-- e.g., new reducer, context -->

**DevOps/Infrastructure (if applicable):**
- [ ] Environment variables needed: <!-- list them -->
- [ ] New dependencies: <!-- list packages/services -->
- [ ] Database migrations: <!-- describe if needed -->

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

- **Blocks:** #<!-- issue numbers that depend on this -->
- **Blocked by:** #<!-- issue numbers this depends on -->
- **Related:** #<!-- other related issues -->

---

## 📌 Additional Context

**Why is this feature needed?**
<!-- Provide business or user context -->

**Any specific UI/UX mockups or designs:**
<!-- Link to Figma, attach image, or describe -->

**Performance or security considerations:**
<!-- Note any special requirements -->

---

## 🧪 Testing Requirements

- [ ] Unit tests required (backend)
- [ ] Integration tests required (backend)
- [ ] E2E tests required (frontend)
- [ ] Manual QA testing needed

**Test scenarios to cover:**
<!-- List key scenarios QA should test -->

---

## ✅ Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria met and verified
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Related bugs fixed or documented
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] PR references this issue
- [ ] Ready for release/merge
